Build per-window relative widths and resolve scale factors

Source: R/layout.R
dot-window_relative_widths.Rd

Build per-window relative widths and resolve scale factors

Usage

.window_relative_widths(win, track = NULL)

Arguments

win

A GRanges object of windows.

track

Optional SeqTrackR6. When provided, window_scale is read from the track and the track-level inferred unit is used as the default. When NULL, falls back to 1e-6 (original behaviour).

Value

A list with rel and scale numeric vectors of length length(win).
